\tzpentry{ID3615}{Magnetic Helicity Functional Correction}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3615 introduces Magnetic Helicity Functional Correction as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \Delta \mathcal{H}_M = n \cdot \Phi_0 \cdot L_\text{link} \end{equation}
